basics.name: Lucho Escobedo
basics.summary: Strategist, entrepreneur, and investor, committed to building organizations that grow with clarity, operate with discipline, and create lasting value.

work.name: REEF Technology

work.summary: Directed data science work to deliver measurable product improvements, operational gains, and a scalable experimentation capability.
